boundary: Toy Ulam-only commit-barrier test. Not a proof about humans, politics, consciousness, black holes, or general AI safety.

rigid_filter.description: narrow buffer and direct narrow commit

porous_direct.description: wide buffer and direct wide commit

cognitive_immune_layer.description: wide buffer with strict verified quorum commit barrier

max_buffer_cognitive_immune_layer.description: very wide buffer with strict verified quorum commit barrier

results.name: U(2,3)

rigid_filter.description: narrow buffer and direct narrow commit

porous_direct.description: wide buffer and direct wide commit

cognitive_immune_layer.description: wide buffer with strict verified quorum commit barrier

max_buffer_cognitive_immune_layer.description: very wide buffer with strict verified quorum commit barrier

results.failure_rule: commit fails if precision < 0.99 OR false_block > 0.001 OR utility <= 0
